title: Principal

title: Superintendent
notes: Cascade Elem + Cascade H S paired (District 3&B), K-12. Collins moved from Wyoming, leads small ranching K-12. No dedicated ECE staff; supt is right contact.

title: Interim Superintendent
notes: Charlo Elem + Charlo H S paired, K-12 district in Lake County (Flathead Reservation area). Jim Baldwin serving on 1-year interim contract since Aug 2025 after Teresa Weems (who replaced Steve Love). District in transition - flag for outreach timing. Email format charlo.k12.mt.us not confirmed for Baldwin - check Apollo.io.

K-6 district in Missoula County, ~188 students, ~1.89 district admin. Website (clintoncougars.com) did not surface staff/superintendent names in search. Needs direct outreach to district office for current supt name.

title: District Clerk / Business Manager
notes: Tiny rural school in Hill County (Havre area), 27 students, 0 school admin, 0.5 district admin. Serena Dawson serves as Clerk/Business Mgr for both Cottonwood and Davey Schools - she is the de facto admin contact. No principal/supt identified. Hill County Supt of Schools Vicki Proctor provides general supervision but is county-level.

title: Superintendent / Principal
notes: K-8 rural school south of Columbia Falls (Flathead County). National Blue Ribbon awardee 2023. Wiest is current supt/principal as of 2025; replaced Sheri Modderman. Email domain is deerparkedu.org (not k12.mt.us) - confirmed from district staff listings.

title: Superintendent / Principal
notes: PK-8 school on Flathead Indian Reservation, ~50 students. Crista Anderson is supt/principal. District email pattern is @dixonschool.org (e.g., rnoland@dixonschool.org confirmed for employment). Likely canderson@dixonschool.org but unconfirmed - check Apollo.io. Mr. Noland is Principal/Federal Programs Director.

PK-8 school in Glacier County (Blackfeet Reservation area), ~50 students, ~1 school admin. Supt/principal name not surfaced in public sources. Address: 125 Washington St, East Glacier Park, MT 59434. Direct outreach needed.

title: Superintendent

Tiny rural school in Toole County, 6 students, 1 teacher, 0.25 district admin, 0 school admin. No district website. No public admin named. Direct outreach needed.

Tiny rural school in Powell County, 17 students, 0.5 district admin, 0 school admin. Per scoping rules, Powell County Supt of Schools Kerry Glisson is a county-level role and not counted as district staff. No district-level admin identified.

Extremely small one-room school in Sweet Grass County, 2 students, 1 teacher, 0 district admin, 0 school admin. Sweet Grass County Supt Matt Kleinsasser provides general supervision but is county-level (not district staff). No district website.

Tiny K-8 in Powell County, 12 students, 2 teachers, 0.1 district admin, 0 school admin. Per scoping rules, Powell County Supt Kerry Glisson is a county-level role, not district staff. No public admin identified at district level.

title: Superintendent / Principal

Tiny PK-8 school in Dawson County, 9 students, 1 teacher, no dedicated principal/supt. Supervised at county level via Dawson County Superintendent of Schools. No district-level admin identified.

Small rural K-8 at base of Beartooth Mountains in Carbon County. Website is lutherschool.org (not .com per input). Search results did not surface current supt/principal name publicly. Direct outreach needed.

Hutterite colony school in Pondera County (Conrad area), ~36 students PK-8, 2 teachers. Website miamielementary.com referenced but no public admin contact surfaced. Hutterite colony schools typically have no dedicated district admin - flag for direct outreach.

title: Superintendent

title: Superintendent / Principal
notes: Special-purpose K-8 school at Yellowstone Boys and Girls Ranch in Billings serving students with emotional/behavioral needs (~12 students per class, year-round trimester). Tresch joined as principal 2012, now supt/principal. Domain is @ybgr.org (Yellowstone Boys and Girls Ranch). Note: this is a specialized therapeutic school, not a typical K-8 district - ECE relevance may be limited.
